Won't let me apply the code

Lacoste: I'm sorry you're having trouble applying the code! Have you encountered any error messages? Also, could you kindly share a screenshot of the items in your cart? I'll be happy to look into the issue! 

Please note that the code applies to full priced orders only.
That is why because the one I have in my cart is on sale

Thank you
Lacoste: My pleasure. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
No, that’s all, I was really hoping to buy them today but I guess wasn't meant to buy them

Lacoste: I'm really sorry it worked out that way, and I understand how disappointing this must be. Hopefully, you can still consider placing an order with us soon. In the meantime, you can check out our new arrivals here: https://lacoste.attn.tv/aezkBsJuM-Jl/
